login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your Aipify account

register.title: Establish your Aipify Workspace
register.subtitle: Set up your Aipify Business Operating System in a few guided steps
register.checkEmail: Please check your email to verify your account.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you reset instructions
forgotPassword.success: Check your email for reset instructions.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a strong password for your Aipify account
resetPassword.success: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in.
resetPassword.invalidLink: This reset link is invalid or has expired.

errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.requiredFields: Please fill in all required fields.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.emailAlreadyRegistered: An account with this email already exists. Sign in instead.
errors.rateLimit: Supabase has reached its hourly email sending limit (about 4 emails per hour for the whole project). Wait about an hour, or temporarily disable email confirmation in the Supabase Dashboard.
errors.configError: Authentication is not configured. Contact support if this persists.

wizard.title: Create your Aipify workspace
wizard.subtitle: Set up your Aipify Business Operating System in a few guided steps
wizard.trustNote: Enterprise-grade onboarding. You control what Aipify can access.
wizard.completionMessage: Welcome to Aipify. Let's build something remarkable together.

owner.title: Account owner
owner.subtitle: Tell us who will lead this workspace

organization.title: Organization
organization.subtitle: Tell us about your company so Aipify can tailor your workspace

package.title: Package
package.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your organization today

needs.title: Initial needs
needs.subtitle: Select the areas where Aipify should support your team first

confirmation.title: Review and confirm
confirmation.subtitle: Confirm your details, security preferences, and create your workspace

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Essential modules for small teams getting started with Aipify.

professional.name: Professional
professional.description: Expanded operational support for growing organizations.

business.name: Business
business.description: Multi-module platform with governance and advanced workflows.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: Contact sales for custom deployment, SSO, and enterprise governance.

confirmation.nextStepDetail: Connect your systems and complete guided workspace setup.
confirmation.securityNote: Permission-based actions, human oversight, and audit-ready workflows are enabled from day one.

passwordStrength.weak: Weak — add length and mixed characters
passwordStrength.fair: Fair — consider adding numbers and symbols

security.infoBody: Aipify supports authenticator apps, recovery codes, trusted devices, and 6-digit verification codes. You can enable 2FA now or after your workspace is created.
security.enableNote: You'll be guided through enrollment in Settings → Two-Factor

terms.acceptAuthority: I confirm that I have authority to register this organization
terms.productUpdates: Send me product updates and Aipify news (optional)

errors.businessEmailInvalid: Please use a business email address (not a personal email provider).
errors.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number.
errors.useCasesRequired: Select at least one initial need.
errors.billingPathRequired: Please choose how you would like to purchase Aipify.
errors.termsRequired: Please accept the terms and confirm your authority.
errors.alreadyCompleted: Your workspace is already set up. Sign in to continue.

twoFactor.verifySubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to continue to Aipify.
twoFactor.recoveryHint: Enter one of the single-use recovery codes you saved when you enabled Aipify sign-in verification.

errors.invalidCode: That code is not valid. Check your authenticator app and try again.
errors.challengeLocked: Too many attempts. Wait 15 minutes or use a recovery code.
errors.generic: Verification could not be completed. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: Your session expired. Sign in again.
errors.configError: Sign-in verification is temporarily unavailable. Contact support if this persists.
